tr.td: 1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (75 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms sublingually as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 doses in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (220 mg) by mouth every 12 hours as needed
Ferrous sulfate 325 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (325 mg) by mouth once daily
Vitamin B12 and/or vitamin B12 derivative-containing product
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
Transfusion of packed red blood cells
Assessment of health and social care needs
Depression screening using Patient Health Questionnaire Two-Item score (procedure)
Urinalysis with reflex to microscopy and culture
Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Achieve and maintain LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL for secondary prevention of ischemic heart disease.
Maintain total cholesterol below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain fasting triglycerides below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain HDL cholesterol above 40 mg/dL.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Reduce body weight by 5% to support blood pressure control.
Limit dietary sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams per day.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week.
Reduce knee pain severity to a tolerable level to improve mobility and quality of life
Increase ability to walk and perform daily activities without significant limitation from knee osteoarthritis
Achieve at least 110 degrees of knee flexion to support independent ambulation
Patient will verbalize understanding of prediabetes, healthy eating, physical activity, and blood glucose monitoring within 3 months.
Reduce hemoglobin A1c to less than 6.5% within 6 months.
Patient will achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight from baseline within 6 months.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.

tr.td: Vaccine product containing only Influenza virus antigen (medicinal product)

Erythrocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count

Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
INR in Platelet poor plasma by Coagulation assay
aPTT in Blood by Coagulation assay
Carbon dioxide [Partial pressure] in Arterial blood
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

ul.li: Achieve and maintain LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL for secondary prevention of ischemic heart disease.
Maintain total cholesterol below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain fasting triglycerides below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain HDL cholesterol above 40 mg/dL.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Reduce body weight by 5% to support blood pressure control.
Limit dietary sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams per day.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week.
Reduce knee pain severity to a tolerable level to improve mobility and quality of life
Increase ability to walk and perform daily activities without significant limitation from knee osteoarthritis
Achieve at least 110 degrees of knee flexion to support independent ambulation
Patient will verbalize understanding of prediabetes, healthy eating, physical activity, and blood glucose monitoring within 3 months.
Reduce hemoglobin A1c to less than 6.5% within 6 months.
Patient will achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight from baseline within 6 months.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.
